title: Emoflix's Swords
description: a sword mod that adds swords from my cosmos heroes mod without the need for side mods
body:
This mod is a mod that adds swords from Adventure Time, Fate, Bleach etc. series.
It does not need any side mode.

To craft swords, you will first need to craft the item called “Sword Core”

In it right now are these swords:
Excalibur, Demon Blood Sword, Night Sword, Asuramaru, Zanpakuto (Zangetsu), Shikai (Zangetsu)

Works good with better combat mod but it works without better combat mod too

When you right click on the Excalibur, it shoots a dragon's breath and has a cooldown of 33 seconds.
Shikai gives you the village hero effect.


More Coming Soon!

[Discord](https://discord.gg/gaRrTzZsK4)

Credits:

Emoflix (me)

[Mücahit - Excalibur, Demon Blood Sword, Night Sword Modeler](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mugiwara_no_mucahid/)

[Atrox - Asuramaru, Zanpakuto and Shikai Modeler](https://www.curseforge.com/members/atrox/projects)


Warning: Do not re-upload, steal, or copy anything.


You can use this mod on any minecraft server you want.
